title: LOX Sword
description: Adds an craftable LOX sword which is a very powerfull weapon from !$#%
body:
Datapacks adds craftable LOX sword. 

(For datapack to work you need to restart server or re enter the  world)

When a player it hit by sword his game will CRASH and he will die.

Any other entities will just die.

By right clicking you can corrupt the world and change biome to !#$@

In !#$@ everyone will have wither effect and blocks will decay near entities.
